sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27036" key="dikwli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐ-κωλία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n27036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">period of two members,</tr_> Mar.Vict.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.182K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
